titleStmt.title: SII 25.263: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 263. (A.R. No. 263 of 1908.) SIHĀWĀ RAIPUR DISTRICT, CENTRAL PROVINCES.

summary.p: Central shrine in the kannarēśvara temple.
This Sanskrit inscription in Nāgarī script do not contain any other details of date except Śaka year 1114.

The inscription gives the genealogy of the king from Siṁharāja. This inscription records the construction of five temples, two in his parents name, two in his own, and one in his issueless brother's name by king Karṇarāja of Kākaira and of one by his wife, queen Bhōpalladevi. These were all built at the sacred place Dēvahrada. The inscription was written in the year 1191-92 A.D. apparently after the completion of the whole group of temples, and it was put up in one of the king's own temples in which Śiva was enshrined. The other one of those which he had built for himself was dedicated to Kēśava.
This inscription gives the genealogy of the king Karṇarāja after whom the temple is still called Kanīsar or Karṇēśvara.
The writer of the inscription was Sūtradhāra Sūpā and the composer of the praśasti was Nṛisiṁha.
(see Ep. Ind. Vol. IX, pp. 185 ff.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Oṁ namaḥ śivāya . tatpātu vastṛsayamīkharalocanānāmagnyarkkasomamayamūttiṁdharaṁ sa
mantāt . yaṁllokaduḥkhada Inapratibhāsanādikhāpyāyanāni kvapayānudinaṁ karoti . 1 . kandarpavā
ṇagaṇasāṇasilāmanojñadikkāminīvadanadarpaṇamaṇḍalasīḥ . devaḥ sasī vijayatetri
tapaḥ payodhisuktāphalaṁ harasirīsukuṭaikaratraṁ . 2 . purūravaprabhṛtibhiḥ nṛpairyovaḍadhanvayaḥ . sa
sya tasgnivabhūdbhūpaḥ siṁdharājo nṛpāgraṇī . 3 . tatprādajāyata mahīpatimolisaṁghararṣaghṛṣṭa
caraṇaḥ kila vāgharājaḥ rājanyatī samabhavajjagatī samassādyena prajāsapi sṛtāṁ bhajatā nṛpīṇa .
. 4 . vopadevobhavattasgnātsiṁghaḥ siṁghādivāparaḥ yena vibhāsitā jagmuddisaḥ satrunṛpaddipāḥ . 5 .
tassrāddabhūtrṛpatimaṇaḍamaṇanaṁśrī śrīkarṇarājanṛpatirviditapratāpa yanyāyavartta nakvapāṇama
yātpraveṣṭuṁ kākairadesamamalaṁ na kasiḥ samarthaḥ . 6 . tasya bhopajjadevīti sahiṣī varavarṇinī vabhūvaḥ
mene yāṁloko lakṣmīṁ kṣitigatāmiva . 7 . svāvāhuvīryeṇa vijitya sarvvānupāntadeśādhipatīsama
ntāt sevākaropāyanadānasīlāṁsakāra sāmrājyapadaṁ dadhānaḥ . 8 . tīrthe devajñade tena kkataṁ prāsā
dapancakaṁ svīyaṁ tatradvayaṁ jātaṁ yatra śaṁkarakesavau . 9 . pitṛbhyāṁ pradadau cānyatkarayitvā hayaṁ nṛpa
sadanaṁ devadevasya manoddāri trisūdanaḥ (śūlinaḥ) . 10 . raṇakesariṇe prādāṁnṛpāyaikaṁ surālayaṁ tadvaṁsakṣīṇa
tāṁ jñātvā bhrātṛsrehena karṇarāṭ . 11 . bhopalladevyā tatraiva prāsādaḥ kāritaḥ subhaḥ bhartuḥ saṁsleṣa
mikvantyā dehataḥ punyatastathā . 12 . caturddasottare seyamekādase sate sake . varhatāṁ sarvvato nityaṁ
nṛsiṁghe kvatinā kvatā . 13 . sūtradhāraḥ sūpā
Digital edition of SII 25.263 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
